name: ROAI Scalper
description: RO-AI Scalper ($ROAI) is a trading system that rewards token stakers with profits from our Solana trading operations, paid in ETH. We use advanced AI and data filters to identify profitable trading opportunities on Solana, sharing these profits with our community. Transaction taxes from ROAI trading volume further boost staker rewards. Perfect for investors seeking passive income through a transparent, community-focused platform.
